abort.no_homes_returned: Authentication failed: The Tado API did not return any 'homes' associated with your account. Please open the official Tado app to check if you need to accept new Terms & Conditions or finish your home setup. If the issue persists, please report this on GitHub.
abort.no_homes: There are no homes linked to this Tado account.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The Tado account used does not match the existing integration.

data_description.full_cloud_mode:
Enable climate entities via cloud polling.

**Required for V2 bridges (GW)** as they have no HomeKit support. For V3 (IB01/GW01) and Tado X, leave disabled to use HomeKit/Matter instead.
data_description.fetch_extended_data: Fetch extended data during **initial setup**. Costs: **1 API call per device** (temperature offset) + **1 API call per heating zone** (away temperature). After initial poll, data is fetched according to configured intervals. Disable to save quota.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tado Hijack
reauth_confirm.description: Your Tado session has expired or the token is invalid. Click SUBMIT to start the re-authentication process.

timeout.title: Activation Timeout
timeout.description: Authentication timed out. This often happens when the Tado API rate limit is exhausted. The limit resets daily at 12:00 CET. Click SUBMIT to try again.

init.title: Configure Tado Hijack
init.description: Configure all settings using collapsible sections.

data_description.scan_interval: Interval for room data (temp, humidity, heating power). IMPORTANT: Dynamically overridden by 'Auto API Quota' when enabled; serves as fallback when calculated budget is exhausted.
data_description.presence_poll_interval: How often to check Home/Away status. Set to a higher value (e.g. 43200s/12h) to save quota.
data_description.slow_poll_interval: How often to sync battery levels, firmware, capabilities and device list. 86400s (24h) is recommended.
data_description.offset_poll_interval: How often to fetch temperature offsets. Costs 1 API call PER VALVE. 0 = disabled.

data_description.auto_api_quota_percent: Use X% of FREE daily quota for status polling (0 = disabled). FREE = Limit - Background Reserve (Syncs) - External Activity (Automations, App use beyond buffer). Hybrid strategy: Uses MAX(Daily Budget - Used, Remaining * X%) → System ALWAYS continues polling even when over daily budget.
data_description.throttle_threshold: Reserve N calls for EVERYTHING outside of Hijack's periodic background polling (Automations, Scripts, Manual App use). Polling stops at this floor to ensure your automations never stall. Recommended: 20.
data_description.quota_safety_reserve: API calls reserved for the self-learning reset window. The system automatically learns the reset time and adaptively distributes this reserve to bridge cloud-side variations. 0 = disabled (not recommended). Default: 2.
data_description.min_auto_quota_interval_s: Minimum polling interval in seconds (5-43200 = 12h max). Standard API: 5s minimum. Proxy: 120s minimum enforced. Lower = faster updates but higher API usage. Default 20s.
data_description.disable_polling_when_throttled: Stop periodic polling entirely when remaining quota hits the safety buffer.
data_description.refresh_after_resume: Automatically fetch target temperature/state after resume schedule (HVAC AUTO). Required because schedules are managed Tado cloud-side. Costs 1 API call.
data_description.suppress_redundant_calls: Skip API calls when target state matches cached state (temperature, mode, presence, power). Saves quota on accidental double-clicks or UI interactions. Only sends when actual change detected. Values not in cache always send.
data_description.suppress_redundant_buttons: Also skip button actions (resume_all, boost_all, turn_off_all, set_mode_all) when ALL zones already match target state. Requires 'Suppress Redundant Calls' to be enabled. Individual explicit actions and sync buttons (manual_poll, refresh) always send.

data_description.reduced_polling_active: Enable the time-based weighted polling profile.
data_description.reduced_polling_start: Time when the economy window starts (e.g. 22:00).
data_description.reduced_polling_end: Time when the economy window ends (e.g. 07:00).
data_description.reduced_polling_interval: Polling interval during the economy window (e.g. 3600s = 1h). Set to 0 to pause updates.

data_description.feature_dew_point: Create a dew point temperature sensor per zone. Calculated from room temperature and humidity. MANDATORY for Tado X: Requires a linked temperature source on the zone device as the cloud API provides no temperature for Tado X.
data_description.feature_mold_detection: Create mold risk sensors per zone. Includes a risk level (none/low/medium/high) and a binary sensor for acute mold risk. MANDATORY for Tado X: Requires a linked temperature source on the zone device.
data_description.outdoor_weather_entity: Select a weather entity (e.g., weather.home) that provides outdoor temperature and humidity. This is required to calculate indoor absolute humidity and to activate 'Ventilation Recommended' sensors. The sensor reports 'Yes' when opening windows effectively reduces indoor moisture.
data_description.ventilation_ah_threshold: Minimum absolute humidity difference between indoor and outdoor required before 'Ventilation Recommended' turns to 'Yes'. A value of 1.0 g/m³ (grams of water per cubic meter of air) ensures that outdoor air is significantly dryer than indoor air before recommending ventilation. Prevents sensor chatter. Default: 1.0.

data_description.api_proxy_url: Advanced: Base URL of a local tado-api-proxy instance. Do NOT include /api/v2. See README for details.
data_description.proxy_token: Optional: Authentication token for the proxy. Will be automatically injected into the URL path (base_url/token/api/v2).
data_description.call_jitter_enabled: Adds random delays before API calls to obfuscate automation patterns. Only effective when using a proxy.
data_description.jitter_percent: Strength of random variation for polls and calls. Default 10% (e.g. 60s -> 54-66s).
data_description.debounce_time: Time window to collect rapid changes before sending to API. Default 5s.
data_description.log_level: Controls the verbosity of the logs. DEBUG shows all API interactions (masked), INFO shows important system events.
data_description.log_version_prefix: Prepends [vX.Y.Z] to every log message from this integration. Makes the running version immediately visible in any log snippet.

error.auth_pending: Authorization still pending. Please authorize on the Tado website and try again.
error.auth_timeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.

manual_poll.name: Manual Poll
manual_poll.description: Force an immediate update from the Tado API. With entity_id, performs a targeted single-entity fetch (saves API quota).

refresh_type.name: Refresh Type
refresh_type.description: Which data to refresh. Targeted types (offsets, away, capabilities) support entity_id for a cheaper single-entity fetch.

entity_id.name: Entity (optional)
entity_id.description: Restrict the refresh to a single entity. Supported for: offsets, away, capabilities. Other types fall back to a full refresh.

resume_all_schedules.name: Resume All Schedules
resume_all_schedules.description: Remove all manual overlays in all zones and return to Smart Schedule.

turn_off_all_zones.name: Turn Off All Zones
turn_off_all_zones.description: Turn off heating in all zones.

boost_all_zones.name: Boost All Zones
boost_all_zones.description: Boost heating in all zones to 25°C.

set_timer.name: Set Timer
set_timer.description: Set a manual overlay with timer duration or auto-return to schedule.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Any zone entity from Tado Hijack.

overlay.name: Overlay Mode
overlay.description: Termination mode: 'manual' (indefinite), 'next_block' (return to next schedule block), or 'presence' (until presence change).

set_timer_all_zones.name: Set Timer for All Zones
set_timer_all_zones.description: Set a manual overlay for all heating and/or AC zones at once.

overlay.name: Overlay Mode
overlay.description: Termination mode: 'manual' (indefinite), 'timer' (with duration), 'next_block' (return to schedule at next time block), or 'presence' (until presence change).

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: Target temperature (will be capped based on zone type).

add_meter_reading.name: Add meter reading
add_meter_reading.description: Upload a meter reading to Tado Energy IQ.

config_entry.name: Config Entry
config_entry.description: Tado Hijack configuration entry to add meter reading to.
